project.component: { "keyToString": { ".NET Launch Settings Profile.ApiGateway: IIS Express.executor": "Run", ".NET Launch Settings Profile.BookingService.Api: IIS Express.executor": "Run", ".NET Launch Settings Profile.TicketService.Api: IIS Express.executor": "Run", "ASKED_SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "Docker.docker-compose.yml: Compose Deployment.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "dev__be__booking", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.pluginManager" } }

option.name: id
option.value: runConfig:.NET Launch Settings Profile.ApiGateway: IIS Express

option.name: id
option.value: runConfig:.NET Launch Settings Profile.BookingService.Api: IIS Express
